description: Composition Red printed kurta made of 100% cotton, has a round neck, yoke with embroidery and pintucks, three-quarter sleeves with embroidery and pintucks above the cuffs, curved piping from the waist to the yoke, curved hem and split side seams Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach Dry inside out in shade Warm iron; do not iron on decorations This simple yet stylish printed kurta from w has styles with ethnic Indian threads. Combining classic prints with modern cuts and slimming silhouettes, this Indo-Western kurta blends cut, colour and the vibrancy of Indian fabrics to create a garment that you can team with a churidar, salwar, patialas or even leggings. Model statistics The product is a size S on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
